data.name: Li-ion battery cycle-life prediction (Severson 2019 benchmark)
data.description: End-to-end machine-learning pipeline predicting a Li-ion cell's lifetime from only its first 100 cycles, with a leakage-safe per-cell evaluation and an elastic-net / XGBoost comparison served live through a FastAPI endpoint (Docker + CI).

data.name: Image compression algorithm using space filling curves
data.description: Image compression using the dither method and hilbert curves as well as a simple comparaison between different other lossless compression methods.
